notes: Sources: DOJ press release May 1999; Forbes March 1999; LA Times March 1999; https://www.justice.gov/archive/opa/pr/1999/May/214at.htm

metric_value: PLATINUM RiskAdvisor and related products gradually discontinued under Computer Associates ownership; CA absorbed PLATINUM's infrastructure and mainframe tools; BI/data warehouse products were not continued as strategic investments
notes: CA's pattern of acquiring and eventually discontinuing acquired products well documented; Aberdeen's 'prevailing trend' prediction was correct conceptually but PLATINUM itself did not survive as champion

metric_value: RDBMS star schema pattern for analytical data warehouses remains the dominant design paradigm in 2026 (Kimball dimensional modeling); directly validates Aberdeen's architectural observation
notes: Aberdeen's endorsement of star schema as sound foundation proved highly durable
